name: Black P Stones Jungles
description: The Black P. Stones Jungles are a Blood-affiliated gang based in Baldwin Village ('The Jungles') on the West Side of South Central Los Angeles, one of the largest gangs in the city with 500-900 members. Originally consisted of City Stone Bloods (Mid-City) and Jungle Stone Bloods (Baldwin Village). They were targeted by 'Operation Stone Cold' (2005, 18 arrested) and 'Operation Red Dawn' (2011, 75 indicted with 900+ officers). They have a rivalry with the 18th Street Gang and a loose alliance with the Playboy Gangster Crips.

sources.title: Black P Stones - Chicago Gang History
